title: Sphaerostephanos arfakianus
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos arfakianus is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Sphaerostephanos and the kingdom Plantae. The classification also includes the phylum Pteridophyta and the division Pteridophyta. Further classification includes the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species.

intro: Sphaerostephanos arfakianus is a fern species native to Papua New Guinea, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, providing relief from various health issues such as wound healing, fever, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Sphaerostephanos arfakianus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
